message: Started doxycycline 2 days ago and now my lips are swollen and I feel short of breath.
label: emergent

message: Rash is spreading fast over my whole body, fever 102, and I feel faint when I stand up.
label: emergent

message: I have painful blisters in my mouth and on my skin after a new medication. Skin is peeling in sheets.
label: emergent

message: Quick question about my bill from March. Oh and there is a dark spot on my shoulder that doubled in size this month.
label: urgent

message: My psoriasis plaques are bleeding and cover most of my legs. Cannot sleep from pain.
label: urgent

message: Hello, I wanted to update my insurance on file. By the way the rash on my face is burning and oozing since yesterday.
label: urgent

message: Can I get a refill on my hydrocortisone cream? The dry patches on my elbows are about the same as last month.
label: routine

message: Should I keep using the lotion twice a day or switch to once daily for maintenance?
label: routine

message: I need to cancel my appointment on Friday and book something in two weeks.
label: admin

message: Your portal charged me twice for the same visit. Please fix the duplicate charge.
label: admin

message: No fever but the red rash on my arm is spreading every few hours and the skin feels tight.
label: urgent

message: Post-op day 5: wound is very red, hot, pus draining, and I have shaking chills.
label: emergent

message: pls help appt change also itchy bumps all over getting worse fast
label: urgent

message: Insurance denied my claim. Also the cellulitis on my leg is more painful and the redness is marching upward.
label: urgent

message: Request refill for moisturizer. Mild itch on scalp, no bleeding or spreading.
label: routine

message: I have a changing mole but it does not hurt and I feel fine. Is this still something to worry about?
label: urgent
label_rationale: Changing mole warrants prompt derm review even without pain; not emergent without red flags.

message: Mild facial redness after starting a new face wash. No swelling, breathing trouble, or mouth sores.
label: routine
label_rationale: Local irritation without systemic or mucosal signs; routine unless worsens.

message: Widespread hives since this morning but breathing is normal and no lip swelling.
label: urgent
label_rationale: Urticaria without anaphylaxis signs is urgent for same-day review, not emergent.

message: Can you explain my statement balance? Also my chronic eczema is stable on current cream.
label: admin
label_rationale: Stable chronic condition does not raise triage priority; billing is the actionable request.

message: I missed two doses of my biologic. Should I take the next dose now or wait?
label: routine
label_rationale: Medication timing question for stable therapy; not an acute flare or emergency.

message: Painful red streak going up my arm from a cut, low-grade fever 99.5, otherwise okay.
label: urgent
label_rationale: Lymphangitis pattern is urgent; sub-100.4 fever without sepsis signs stops short of emergent.

message: Sunburn with blistering on shoulders after the beach. No nausea, no confusion, drinking fluids.
label: routine
label_rationale: Localized sunburn without systemic toxicity is routine/self-care with optional visit.

message: I need prior authorization paperwork for my topical. The rash is unchanged from last visit.
label: admin
label_rationale: Prior auth is admin; unchanged rash does not elevate clinical priority.

message: New painful purple spots on legs and I feel very weak. Not sure if related to my skin meds.
label: emergent
label_rationale: Purpura plus systemic weakness may indicate serious reaction or vasculitis; treat as emergent pending review.

message: Itchy scalp for years, slightly worse this week. Want shampoo recommendation before my routine visit in 3 weeks.
label: routine
label_rationale: Chronic mild worsening with planned visit is routine product advice.
